name: Spine Shot
description: The creature fires a rigid spine or quill at a target.

name: Venom Spit
description: The creature spits a concentrated glob of poison. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

name: Arcane Bolt
description: A projectile of pure magical force.

name: Necrotic Bolt
description: A tendril of death-energy lances out. On a hit, the target cannot regain hit points until the start of this creature's next turn.

name: Psychic Lance
description: A focused beam of mental assault. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

name: Cinder Spit
description: A lump of smoldering material that ignites on impact. On a hit, the target catches fire and takes 1d6 fire damage at the start of its next turn unless it spends an action to put out the flames.

name: Bone Shard
description: The creature hurls a razor-edged shard of bone. On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 5 feet until the shard is removed (requires an action).

name: Lightning Strike
description: A bolt of electrical energy. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or drop one held item of the creature's choice.

name: Thorn Dart
description: A magically hardened thorn or sliver of enchanted wood. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be distracted by vivid hallucinations and have disadvantage on its next attack roll.

name: Ice Shard
description: A spike of conjured ice launched at speed. On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of its next turn as frost encrusts the wound.

name: Acid Spit
description: A pressurized stream of corrosive fluid. On a hit, the target also takes 1d4 acid damage at the start of its next turn as the acid continues eating away at armor and flesh.

name: Shadow Needle
description: A barbed sliver of pure shadow that buries into the soul. On a hit, the target cannot benefit from the Help action or any ally's assistance until the start of the creature's next turn.

name: Thunder Shot
description: A concussive burst of compressed air or sonic force. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be deafened until the end of its next turn and pushed back 5 feet.

name: Poison Dart
description: A tiny dart coated in fast-acting paralytic venom. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or have its movement speed reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

name: Radiant Burst
description: A searing pulse of light or infernal fire. On a hit against an undead or construct, the target has disadvantage on all rolls until the end of its next turn as the light overwhelms its senses.

name: Hex Bolt
description: A tendril of cursed energy that wraps around the target's will. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

name: Frost Bolt
description: A lance of crystalline ice that spreads on impact, locking limbs in place. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained until the start of its next turn.

name: Entangling Shot
description: A barbed projectile trailing enchanted vines or webbing. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained until the start of its next turn.

name: Sleep Dart
description: A tiny dart coated in soporific toxin. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn, and it falls unconscious if it fails by 5 or more.

name: Gale Shot
description: A compressed burst of wind launched as a concussive projectile. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

name: Blinding Flash
description: A concentrated burst of searing radiant light aimed directly at the eyes. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the start of its next turn.

name: Dread Bolt
description: A bolt of compacted terror drawn from the plane of death. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the end of its next turn.

name: Paralytic Sting
description: A venomous stinger loaded with a powerful paralytic compound. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be incapacitated until the start of its next turn.

name: Web Shot
description: A glob of super-strength webbing fired at high velocity. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained until it breaks free.

name: Sonic Lance
description: A focused beam of destructive sound. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be deafened until the end of its next turn.

name: Sapping Ray
description: A draining beam of entropy that weakens vital defenses. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn.

name: Ice Lance
description: A piercing javelin of solid ice hurled with magical force. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Strength saving throw or be restrained by freezing ice until the start of its next turn.

name: Mesmer Shot
description: A dart filled with psychic-infused compound that clouds the mind. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the end of its next turn, using its action to move toward the nearest creature.

name: Void Bolt
description: A chunk of condensed spatial nothingness fired from between dimensions. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Wisdom saving throw or be frightened until the start of its next turn, as it catches a glimpse of the void.

name: Corrupting Arrow
description: A cursed arrow or bolt that delivers a withering toxin on impact. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute.

name: Fire Bolt
description: A mote of fire hurled at a target, igniting flammable materials it touches.

name: Rock Hurl
description: The creature tears up a massive chunk of earth or stone and hurls it with terrifying force.

name: Arrow Volley
description: A disciplined barrage of arrows from a trained archer, keeping pressure on the target at range.

name: Cursed Bolt
description: A barbed bolt of necrotic energy that lodges in the target's aura. The target has disadvantage on death saving throws until the start of its next turn.

name: Spectral Beam
description: An incorporeal beam that ignores most physical barriers. This attack is made with advantage against targets behind half cover.

name: Magma Glob
description: A hurled blob of liquid rock that splashes on impact and slows movement. On a hit, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until it spends an action to scrape off the cooling magma.

name: Death Ray
description: A focused beam of pure entropic force that taxes the living. The target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or take maximum damage.

name: Crystal Flechette
description: A barrage of razor-sharp crystal shards formed from pure magical energy and fired in a tight cluster.

name: Bone Arrow
description: A sharpened fragment of bone fired as a projectile. The wound refuses to close, and the target takes 1d4 piercing damage the first time it moves on its next turn.

name: Eldritch Blast
description: A crackling beam of raw eldritch energy, the simplest expression of pact magic.

name: Ember Shot
description: A fragment of solidified flame spat at the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 fire damage at the start of its next turn as the ember lingers.

name: Chain Bolt
description: A bolt of electricity that arcs between nearby targets. On a hit, one creature within 10 feet of the target also takes half the lightning damage.

name: Radiant Arrow
description: An arrow or bolt suffused with holy or celestial light, burning the unrighteous.

name: Toxic Breath
description: A directed jet of concentrated toxin sprayed at a single target. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 poison damage at the start of each of its turns for 1 minute unless it succeeds on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw at the end of its turn.

name: Shadow Bolt
description: A bolt of concentrated shadow. On a hit, the area within 5 feet of the target is lightly obscured until the start of the creature's next turn.

name: Force Bolt
description: A point-blank-range bolt of pure kinetic force. On a hit, the target is pushed 5 feet away from this creature.

name: Frost Arrow
description: An arrow or bolt coated in magical frost that chills on contact. The target's speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of its next turn.

name: Static Discharge
description: A built-up charge of static electricity released in a crackling arc at close range.

name: Holy Javelin
description: A weapon blessed with divine power, thrown with righteous fury.

name: Virulent Spit
description: A highly concentrated burst of venom spat with precise aim. On a hit, the target must succeed on a DC {dc} Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute.
